summary: Environmental Risk AI Module - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 14/14 tests PASSED. Frontend: Environmental Risk card and Command Center panel working correctly with all required sub-components.

test_categories.auth_tests: 2 PASS - 401 returned without auth for both endpoints
test_categories.environment_risk_single: 5 PASS - response structure, breakdown 5 components, weather details, air quality, recommendations
test_categories.fleet_environment: 3 PASS - returns array, device structure, sorted by risk desc
test_categories.command_center: 3 PASS - has environment_status array, generated_at, counts

device_health_page.weather_card: PASS - data-testid='env-weather-card' shows temp, wind, humidity, AQI
device_health_page.breakdown_bars: PASS - data-testid='env-breakdown' shows Heat, Air Quality, Rain, Wind, UV

command_center_page.device_entries: PASS - 8 devices with env score, temp, humidity, wind

GET /api/operator/environment-risk/fleet.response: Array of devices sorted by environment_score desc, each with device_id, device_identifier, environment_score, risk_level, weather, air_quality, recommendations

GET /api/operator/device-health.coordinates: Devices include latitude and longitude fields

GET /api/operator/command-center.environment_status: Array of fleet environmental data included

device_environment_risk_card.location: Device Health page > Click device row > Expansion panel

components_verified.breakdown_bars: Heat=3, Air Quality=2, Rain=0, Wind=1, UV=0.5

command_center_environment_panel.location: Command Center page > bottom right panel

critical_code_review_comments: OpenWeatherMap API uses fallback/simulated data due to new API key - system automatically switches to live data when key activates (MOCKED)
Weather data cached for 30 minutes per location grid cell (~1km) - good for performance
Fleet endpoint uses asyncio.gather for concurrent device evaluation - efficient
5-factor risk model properly weighted: heat(30%), air(25%), rain(20%), wind(15%), UV(10%)
DeviceEnvironmentRisk component receives lat/lng from device health data and calls evaluateEnvironmentRisk API
Command Center EnvironmentStatusPanel displays devices sorted by risk score (worst first)
seed_data_creation: Using pre-seeded devices with locations from device_locations table
context_for_next_testing_agent: Environmental Risk AI module complete. Backend uses environment_risk_engine.py with 5-factor scoring model. Frontend DeviceEnvironmentRisk.jsx renders in Device Health expansion panel. Command Center shows EnvironmentStatusPanel. OpenWeatherMap API is MOCKED (using fallback/simulated data that mimics real API format) - will auto-switch to live when API key activates.

mocked_apis.OpenWeatherMap Weather API: Fallback/simulated data used - varies by location grid cell
